body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent-arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Dependent arising — predictive processing, free energy principle, active inference, Bayesian brain, prediction error in perception and action.

**Analgesia for the Bayesian Brain: How Predictive Coding Offers Insights Into the Subjectivity of Pain.** — Curr Pain Headache Rep. PMID: 37421540. DOI: 10.1007/s11916-023-01122-5. In order to better treat pain, we must understand its architecture and pathways. Many modulatory approaches of pain management strategies are only poorly understood. This review aims to provide atheoretical framework of pain perception and modulation in order to assist in clinical understanding and research of analgesia and anesthesia.
